rows.description: Computus Geo. Payter Rectoris a secunde die Novemb. 1708 ad eodem diem 1709.
rows.notes: Title at top of page. Handwriting mostly clear but a couple of abbreviations (Geo., Payter) and Latin words are slightly uncertain (e.g. 'Rectoris'). No amounts on this line.
rows.section_header: Computus Geo. Payter Rectoris a secunde die Novemb. 1708 ad eodem diem 1709.

rows.description: Imprimis reddidit comput. de remanentib in cista
rows.notes: Amount aligned with three right-hand columns. The last pence digit is slightly ambiguous (looks like '10' but could be '16' or '10'); chosen as 10 pence because 16 pence would violate pence range and appears more like a 0 than a 6 on closer inspection.
rows.section_header: Computus Geo. Payter Rectoris a secunde die Novemb. 1708 ad eodem diem 1709.
rows.english_description: Balance of cash remaining in the chest as returned in the account.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Balance of cash remaining in the chest, amounting to £44 17s 10d.

rows.notes: Section heading (Arrearages). No monetary figures on this line; clearly introduces the list that follows.
Clear aligned amount '60 00 00' in the three right columns. Vertical ruling (inferred from alignment of other totals) matches cleanly.
rows.english_description: Annual rent arrears from Guiney.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent arrears from Guiney, amounting to £60 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Pounds and shillings are clear ('59 19'); the pence column is somewhat smudged/condensed and looks like a single-digit (read as '9'). There is a faint flourish after the pence that might be a fraction mark but is not clear enough to assign a valid fraction value confidently.
rows.english_description: Annual rent arrears from Long Wittenham.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent arrears from Long Wittenham, amounting to £59 19s 9d.

rows.notes: The name is abbreviated/uncertain (read as 'minhinnet in pt') but the amount '20 00 00' at the right is clear and aligned with the pounds column.
rows.english_description: Rent arrears from Minhinnet (place name uncertain); entry unclear in wording.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent arrears from Minhinnet (place name uncertain), amounting to £20 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Clear reading: description legible and amount clearly '58 00 00' in pounds/shillings/pence columns.
rows.english_description: Annual rent arrears from South Newington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent arrears from South Newington, amounting to £58 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Description 'Cuddington' and 'pro mich' readable. Amount '10 00 00' aligned and clear.
rows.english_description: Rent from the Cuddington rectory payable at Michaelmas (rectory payment).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent from the Cuddington rectory payable at Michaelmas, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Pounds/shillings/pence '03 08 08' are distinct and well aligned; handwriting clear for both description and amounts.
rows.english_description: Rent from the Merton rectory payable at Michaelmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent from the Merton rectory payable at Michaelmas, amounting to £3 8s 8d.

rows.notes: Description legible enough to read 'Chacehill' with the temporal tag; no amount written on the same line (appears to be part of a grouped set of small items). Could be a sub-item of the Arrearages grouping.
rows.english_description: Rent arrears from Chace (Chase) Hill for one and a half years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent arrears from Chace Hill for one and a half years; amount not stated.

rows.notes: Short place/name 'Thrup' (or 'Thrupp') with no amount visible on this line. Ink and spacing are clear; classification as an entry (not a header) based on indentation and context.
rows.english_description: Rent arrears from Thrupp (place); amount not stated.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent arrears from Thrupp; amount not stated.

rows.notes: Small amount clearly written as '0 2 6' (interpreted as 0 pounds, 2 shillings, 6 pence). The three right columns align well with this row.
rows.english_description: Capons received from Ralph Marshall in settlement of arrears.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Capons received from Ralph Marshall in settlement of arrears, amounting to £0 2s 6d.

rows.notes: Right-hand columns show a small figure. Pounds appear 0, shillings '4', pence looks like '5' with a small trailing loop/mark which resembles the old 'ob' halfpenny symbol; interpreted here as a halfpenny (0.5). The fraction mark is faint—alternative is no fraction.
rows.english_description: Annual rent arrears from Lord (tenant or place name 'Lord').
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent arrears from Lord, amounting to £0 4s 5½d.

rows.notes: Digits read as '03 03 03' though the spacing is tight. Pounds and shillings clear; pence has minor smudge but matches neighboring alignment.
rows.english_description: Annual rent arrears from Culcatt (place name uncertain).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent arrears from Culcatt, amounting to £3 3s 3d.

rows.notes: Amount appears as '02 12 03' — shillings '12' are clear, pence '3' is slightly compressed but legible. There is a small ink flourish after the pence which was not interpreted as a fraction.
rows.english_description: Rent from the Cuddington mills payable at Michaelmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent from the Cuddington mills payable at Michaelmas, amounting to £2 12s 3d.

rows.notes: Entry present without an amount on this line — likely part of the same category of arrear items; no clear numerals aligned to this row.
rows.english_description: Rent arrears from Bampton covering two years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent arrears from Bampton for two years; amount not stated.

rows.notes: Handwriting is trickier here ('Mountfaude' and Latin 'quinquennis et dimid.' inferred). No amount on the same line; ink gets slightly fainter.
rows.english_description: Arrears of rent from Mountfaude covering five and a half years (place name uncertain).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears of rent from Mountfaude for five and a half years; amount not stated.

rows.notes: Legible description with no amount visible on line. Likely part of grouped arrears entries.
rows.english_description: Rent arrears from Hughes covering two years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent arrears from Hughes for two years; amount not stated.

rows.notes: Description clear; no numeric amount on this line. Columns to the right are blank for this row.
rows.english_description: Rent arrears from Greenway covering three years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent arrears from Greenway for three years; amount not stated.

rows.notes: Entry with no amount. 'Walker' and 'anne' readable; likely an arrear item with amount elsewhere or omitted.
rows.english_description: Annual rent arrears from Walker.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent arrears from Walker; amount not stated.

rows.notes: Amount reads '00 15 0' — interpreted as 0 pounds, 15 shillings, 0 pence. Columns are well aligned and digits are distinct.
rows.english_description: Annual rent arrears from Franklyn.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent arrears from Franklyn, amounting to £0 15s 0d.

rows.notes: Clear amount '01 00 00' for this row. Description is legible and the numeric columns are unambiguous.
rows.english_description: Rent arrears from Minne covering two years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent arrears from Minne for two years, amounting to £1 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Name read as 'Mofineux' (spelling uncertain). No corresponding numbers visible on this line; might be grouped with following entries.
rows.english_description: Annual rent arrears from Mofineux (tenant name uncertain).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent arrears from Mofineux; amount not stated.

rows.notes: Right-hand numerals appear as '04 18 7' but the pence digit is slightly smudged. Interpreted as 4 pounds, 18 shillings, 7 pence; this is plausible though shillings 18 is high for a small item — still within 0–19 validation.
rows.english_description: Rent from Sadler payable at Michaelmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent from Sadler payable at Michaelmas, amounting to £4 18s 7d.

rows.description: Tunbrill { Napper pro sesquianno / Hopkins & sesquianno }
rows.notes: This line shows a braced group (Tunbrill) with two sub-items; to the right the amounts '06 07 8' are aligned with the braces. Handwriting cramped; chosen to attribute the numeric to the grouped entry. Pence digit blurred but fits range.
rows.english_description: Grouped arrears from Tunbrill and from Napper and Hopkins each for one and a half years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Grouped arrears from Tunbrill, Napper, and Hopkins for one and a half years, amounting to £6 7s 8d.

rows.notes: Amount reads as '04 17 2' — digits reasonably clear though the pence column is narrow. Description 'Clifton Ferry' is legible.
rows.english_description: Annual rent arrears from Clifton Ferry.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent arrears from Clifton Ferry, amounting to £4 17s 2d.

rows.notes: Right columns show '10 1 9'. Pounds and pence clear; the shillings digit is small but consistent with surrounding alignment.
rows.english_description: Rent arrears from Densington covering three years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent arrears from Densington for three years, amounting to £10 1s 9d.

rows.notes: Reading '08 03 06' — the place name is faint and uncertain ('Brewkeruse' tentative). Amount columns are readable and fall into valid ranges.
rows.english_description: Annual rent arrears from Brewkeruse (place name uncertain).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent arrears from Brewkeruse, amounting to £8 3s 6d.

rows.notes: Description is partly faded/abbreviated; no clear numeric amount on this line. Possibly a line-item without a present amount or with amount carried on another line.
rows.english_description: Annual rent arrears from the Southrinton tenement.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent arrears from the Southrinton tenement; amount not stated.

rows.notes: Handwriting compact; likely 'Trethewru' or similar with 'sesqui anno'. No amount visible on this line.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent arrears from Trethcwm for one and a half years; amount not stated.

rows.notes: A longer Latinized place/account name. No aligned numbers on the same row; ink slightly faded here.
rows.english_description: Arrears of rent from the Merton village for four years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears of rent from the Merton village for four years, amount not stated.

rows.notes: Right-hand columns show '04 00 00'. Description 'Backgate Jenning' readable; numeric alignment clear.
rows.english_description: Arrears of rent from Backgate tenant Jenning.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears of rent from Backgate tenant Jenning, amounting to £4 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Amount appears as '05 00 00' and is well aligned. Description 'Yardington' legible; 'mich' (for Michaelmas) noted.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears of rent for Yardington due at Michaelmas, amounting to £5 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Description is unclear ('Tue ?rients' or 'Tuc entrents'); the numeric cluster to the right reads '05 07 02'. Because the textual label is highly uncertain, confidence is reduced even though numbers align.
rows.english_description: Unclear — possible transcription error.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Unclear — possible transcription error; amount recorded as £5 7s 2d.

rows.notes: Final line before the total shows '00 08 0' (interpreted as 8 shillings). The pounds column is empty/0. The writing of the last zero pence is faint but plausible.
rows.english_description: Arrears of rent from Warner for two years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears of rent from Warner for two years, amounting to £0 8s 0d.

rows.notes: Final total at bottom right clearly written as '322 19 9' under a ruling line. Alignment and digits are unambiguous.
